reasoning: The CDC's official counter reports 71 total cases of H5 bird flu in the US since early 2024. News from late March corroborates numbers around 70-71. The condition requires 100 cases to be reached by March 31, 2025. With only one day remaining before the deadline, it is virtually impossible to see a surge of 29 new confirmed cases when there has only been an increase of a few cases per month recently. The prediction market Polymarket was already at 1% on March 20. Therefore, the probability of hitting 100 cases by March 31 is near zero.
